text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I've got a show at the school coming up
with the best crew in the biz!★ You better
be there to turn it up, bestieee!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You bet! Which songs are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Good question! I was thinking something
like the songs you showed me… the ones
that slap and go super hard!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Okay, okay! I'll list up some of my other favs.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Can't forget the glitter tape! Everything's
gotta pop, right? But… cleanup might be a
pain, huh? Uuugh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There's gotta be a tape that doesn't drop
glitter everywhere. Just leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Tell me anything you wanna do.
Whatever it is, I bet we can make it work!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! You're legit the MVP of this party! For real, I'm so hyped for this party! WOOT!!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Haha! I'm the one who's hyped now just
talking to you! You gotta hit everyone with
that killer smile!
